reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Code reading verified: subscriber_beacon_blocks.go:154 passes sidecar.Index directly instead of calling peerdas.ComputeSubnetForDataColumnSidecar(). However, on mainnet both NumberOfColumns and DataColumnSidecarSubnetCount equal 128, so column_index % 128 == column_index for all valid indices [0,128). The code is spec-non-compliant but not exploitable on mainnet. The spec subgraph SG-010 requires publishing only on subscribed subnets, and SG-005 mandates modulo computation. While data_columns_reconstruct.go:198 correctly uses ComputeSubnetForDataColumnSidecar, the flagged code omits it. This is a latent maintainability issue but not a current vulnerability as subnet==column on deployed networks.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-010 (distributed_blob_publishing) INV-002: Publishing only occurs on subscribed subnets. SG-005 (compute_subnet_for_data_column_sidecar): subnet_id = column_index % DATA_COLUMN_SIDECAR_SUBNET_COUNT.
